nasb.text: And He continued by questioning them, “But who do you say that I am?” Peter *answered and *said to Him, “You are the Christ.”

esv.text: And he asked them, “But who do you say that I am?” Peter answered him, “You are the Christ.”

cnv.text: 他又問他們說：“那麼你們呢？你們說我是誰？”彼得回答：“你就是基督。”

ccb.text: 耶稣又问他们：“那么，你们说我是谁？” 彼得回答说：“你是基督！”

csbs.text: 耶稣又问他们：“那么你们呢？你们说我是谁？” 彼得回答说：“你是基督！”
